ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic sequence */,
  "gisaid_accession" TEXT /* GISAID accession number for the sequence */,
  "gisaid_clade" TEXT /* GISAID clade designation */,
  "genebank_accession" TEXT /* GenBank accession number for cross-reference */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "clade" TEXT /* Clade of the virus */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of collection */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the sample was collected */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the country (e.g., state, province) */,
  "country_exposure" TEXT /* Country of exposure for the host */,
  "division_exposure" TEXT /* Division of exposure for the host */,
  "host" TEXT /* Host species from which the sample was collected */,
  "vaccine_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the host */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the host */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Recent travel history of the host */,
  "public_health_interventions" TEXT /* Public health interventions applied in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_sequences_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_sequences_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., Alpha, Beta) */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the variant's characteristics and mutations */,
  "mutation_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about specific mutations in the variant */,
  "transmissibility" TEXT /* Rating or measure of how easily the variant spreads */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Rating or measure of the severity of the illness caused by the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "healthcare_system_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the country's healthcare system */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the country it belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exposure_data" (
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exposure record */,
  "gisaid_accession" TEXT /* GISAID accession number related to exposure */,
  "country_exposure" TEXT /* Country where exposure occurred */,
  "division_exposure" TEXT /* Division where exposure occurred */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Recent travel history of the host */,
  "public_health_interventions" TEXT /* Public health interventions applied in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exposure_data_gisaid_accession FOREIGN KEY ("gisaid_accession") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("gisaid_accession")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_species" TEXT /* Species of the host (e.g., Human, Animal) */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the host */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the host */,
  "vaccine_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the host */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the host */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Recent travel history of the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the laboratory */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status or certification of the laboratory */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the laboratory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection event */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genomic sequence collected */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the laboratory that collected the sample */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for sample collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_events_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_events_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genomic sequence analyzed */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the identified variant */,
  "date_analyzed" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., variant identified) */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public health official) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user accessing the data */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genomic sequence being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id")
)
